blockers.description: Port 3000 in TIME_WAIT state from previous server runs, causing EADDRINUSE during verification
blockers.workaround: Use alternate port 3002 for verification, or wait 60s

decisions.rationale: Maintains codebase consistency and reduces cognitive load
